markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on the website cutover plan, timeline, and blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Aggressive 6-Week Cutover:** The full site migration is targeted for a mid-March launch, with a new project plan now serving as the source of truth for tracking progress and escalating blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [**Contract & Budget Blockers:** The contract is stalled by an \~$11k budget increase and payment logistics post-acquisition. Both teams will investigate Q1 payment status to resolve this.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Agent-Centric Architecture:** The new site architecture uses agents as the central hub, routing users to related content (guides, connectors) to drive engagement and activation.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Publishing is paused during the migration. The new strategy will build content clusters around agents, starting with the top 5–6 agents based on current data.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Project Timeline & Plan

  - [An aggressive but realistic 6-week cutover is planned, targeting a mid-March launch.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Start Date:** Feb 3rd (date of the initial presentation to Kaitlin & Tiago).](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [A new project plan was created to manage the project's growing scope.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Provide internal visibility and serve as the source of truth for tracking progress and escalating blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Shared With:** Kaitlin (new email) and Tiago (old email).](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [The forward-deployed engineer (dev work) is on PTO, returning early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [**Action:** Liz will get answers on migration expectations, deadlines, and long-term maintenance upon their return.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### Contract & Budget

  - [The contract is stalled by two issues:](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Budget Increase:** An \~$11k increase, based on a verbal agreement between Tiago and Marcel, needs to be formalized.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Payment Logistics:** The acquisition complicates payment. Kaitlin will confirm if Toric pays quarterly and if a Q1 payment is due for the new scope.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [The Statement of Work (SoW) focuses on editorial content (SEO), not dev work.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The long-term plan is SEO content, while the dev work is a prerequisite for that strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### New Site Architecture & Prototype

  - [Liz demoed the prototype (from the Loom video) to illustrate the new architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Core Concept:** Agents are the central hub, routing users to related content to drive activation.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Improved UI/UX:** Cleaner design with linkable inputs/outputs on agent pages.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Navigation:** Routes users to a "Connectors Hub" and "Related Guides."](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Content Migration Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [**Process:** Merge, redirect, or delete legacy content.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Safeguard:** High-performing legacy content will be protected to preserve SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Agent Forking:** Pushed to a post-launch MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Technical validation of agent cloning is complete, de-risking the feature for a later release.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)

### Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [Publishing is paused during the migration to focus all resources on the cutover.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Current traffic is stable, likely due to recent refreshes and the acquisition. Liz will monitor weekly for any dips.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**New Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Build guides that surround a specific agent.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Week 2:** Map programmatic and connector content related to that agent.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build out 18 agent clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [**Agent Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [Kaitlin confirmed the first 5–6 agents in the current list are the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will start building content clusters around these top agents.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Liz (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Confirm Q1 payment status for the new scope with Audrey.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Get answers on migration expectations, deadlines, and maintenance from the engineer upon their return.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [Begin content clustering for the top 5–6 agents.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**Kaitlin (Toric):**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Confirm if Toric pays quarterly and if a Q1 payment is due for the new scope.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Review the new project plan.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Resolve the contract's \~$11k budget increase and payment logistics.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
